gold_change_reason: Added preprocessing to filter out comment lines and blank lines from m/z input string, as required by D-axis operator for increased input complexity and C-axis operator for handling the new constraint.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the new input/data complexity introduced by this operator.
Scaled executable cases must expose the new computation and contract constraints introduced by this operator.
implementation_notes: The solution splits mzStr into lines, strips whitespace, and ignores blank lines or lines starting with '#'.
Non-numeric lines are also skipped to maintain robustness.
The core query logic to LipidMaps remains unchanged, as the expected output for the given numeric m/z values is identical to the seed case.
assumptions: The LIPIDMAPS_URL is still valid and accessible.
The response format from LipidMaps contains an 'Input Mass' column or uses the first column for input mass.
